programmes.show_description: WWII thriller. A group of escaped American military prisoners en route to Switzerland volunteer to help the French resistance steal a Nazi V2 rocket warhead. (1978)
Action with Bruce Willis. A wealthy CEO hires mercenaries to protect a piece of dangerous technology, but they find themselves racing against time when terrorists kidnap his daughter. (2020)
Adaptation of the classic adventure yarn, starring Patrick Swayze as courageous Allan Quatermain, who is employed to locate the mine and uncover the truth behind the legends. Ep1
Welcome to LEGEND XTRA - your home for movies and series full of action, adventure, suspense and much more!
When Malone finds a knife, he is transported back to the East End of London in 1888 - the scene of Jack the Ripper's brutal murders. S3, Ep5/22
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Fantastical prehistoric adventure inspired by Edgar Rice Burroughs' literary classic. A newlywed couple on a romantic cruise stumble upon an island overrun by ancient malevolent creatures. (2009)

A corrupt police officer resorts to kidnapping the wife of a small-statured stuntman to retrieve a cocaine package stuck in a vent. S3, Ep10

Crime thriller with Chiwetel Ejiofor. A gang of corrupt cops are blackmailed by the mob into carrying out a heist - but realise they can only do it if they kill a police officer as a diversion. (2016)
Explosive action with Billy Zane. When the Serbian Prime Minister is assassinated, an elite special ops team must rescue the US Ambassador and pull Europe back from the brink of war. (2011)
Voyeuristic thriller with Hilary Swank. A recently single young doctor moves into a new apartment on her own, unaware that her landlord has a terrifying obsession with her. (2011)

Action thriller with Steven Seagal. A soldier from an elite military force disobeys orders and leads his men on a mission to rescue a friend who has been trapped behind enemy lines. (2016)
